name: Bloody Mary
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the vodka, tomato juice, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco sauce into a shaker filled with ice.
2. Shake well until chilled.
3. Strain the mixture into an old-fashioned glass filled with ice cubes.
4. Add pepper and salt to taste.
5. Optionally, garnish with a wedge of lime.
